description: A customizable navbar component used for top level navigation of all Trimble applications.

properties.name: logoName
properties.description: The name of the logo to display. Supports any valid 'logo-name' from the 'modus-wc-logo' component. Defaults to 'trimble'.

properties.name: appsMenuOpen
properties.description: The open state of the apps menu.

properties.name: condensedMenuOpen
properties.description: The open state of the condensed menu.

properties.name: customClass
properties.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the host element.

properties.name: mainMenuOpen
properties.description: The open state of the main menu.

properties.name: notificationsMenuOpen
properties.description: The open state of the notifications menu.

properties.name: searchDebounceMs
properties.description: Debounce time in milliseconds for search input changes. Default is 300ms.

properties.name: searchInputOpen
properties.description: The open state of the search input.

properties.name: userCard
properties.description: User information used to render the user card.

properties.name: userMenuOpen
properties.description: The open state of the user menu.

properties.name: visibility
properties.description: The visibility of individual navbar buttons. Default is user profile visible, others hidden.
properties.default: {     ai: false,     apps: false,     help: false,     logo: true,     mainMenu: false,     notifications: false,     search: false,     searchInput: false,     user: true,   }

events.name: aiClick
events.description: Event emitted when the AI button is clicked or activated via keyboard.

events.name: appsClick
events.description: Event emitted when the apps button is clicked or activated via keyboard.

events.name: appsMenuOpenChange
events.description: Event emitted when the apps menu open state changes.

events.name: condensedMenuOpenChange
events.description: Event emitted when the condensed menu open state changes.

events.name: helpClick
events.description: Event emitted when the help button is clicked or activated via keyboard.

events.name: mainMenuOpenChange
events.description: Event emitted when the main menu open state changes.

events.name: myTrimbleClick
events.description: Event emitted when the user profile Access MyTrimble button is clicked or activated via keyboard.

events.name: notificationsClick
events.description: Event emitted when the notifications button is clicked or activated via keyboard.

events.name: notificationsMenuOpenChange
events.description: Event emitted when the notifications menu open state changes.

events.name: searchChange
events.description: Event emitted when the search input value is changed.

events.name: searchClick
events.description: Event emitted when the search button is clicked or activated via keyboard.

events.name: searchInputOpenChange
events.description: Event emitted when the search input open state changes.

events.name: signOutClick
events.description: Event emitted when the user profile sign out button is clicked or activated via keyboard.

events.name: trimbleLogoClick
events.description: Event emitted when the logo button is clicked or activated via keyboard,regardless of the `logoName` prop value.

events.name: userMenuOpenChange
events.description: Event emitted when the user menu open state changes.
